Foundations and Scalar Fields.topic: Classical field theory and Lagrangian formalism
Foundations and Scalar Fields.description: Build field theories from symmetry principles using actions and Euler-Lagrange equations. Connect kinetic and interaction terms to conservation laws and dimensions.
Promote classical fields to operators, impose commutators, and define creation/annihilation operators. Connect normalizations to delta functions and box quantization.

Path Integrals and Quantization.description: Construct time-ordered, retarded, and advanced propagators in x- and p-space. Emphasize boundary conditions and mass dependence.

Fermions and Spinor Structure.description: Solve plane-wave spinors and completeness relations; compute bilinears and currents. Interpret helicity and chirality in simple processes.
Use Clifford algebra identities and trace technology. Classify bilinears by Lorentz and discrete symmetries.

Renormalization and Quantum Corrections.description: Regulate loop integrals in d=4-2e. Track poles, scales, and scheme conventions (MS/MS-bar).

Renormalization Group and Scaling.description: Formulate RG equations and classify fixed points. Linearize flows and extract simple critical exponents.

Renormalization Group and Scaling.topic: Beta functions in phi4 and QED
Renormalization Group and Scaling.description: Compute one-loop beta-functions with attention to factors and schemes. Interpret UV/IR behavior and triviality vs asymptotic freedom.

Anomalies and Supersymmetry.description: Compute axial anomalies and understand current non-conservation. State cancellation conditions.

Amplitude and On-Shell Methods.description: Represent external states with spinor variables and express amplitudes using angle/square brackets. Enforce little-group scaling and on-shell constraints.
Reconstruct tree amplitudes from complex momentum shifts and factorization. Address boundary terms and valid shifts.

Effective Field Theories.description: Build the chiral Lagrangian under symmetry constraints and compute low-energy pion processes. Track LECs and orders.
